model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + C(year) + C(statefip)", data=df, weights=df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="HC1")
sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Mexican origin) AND bpl == 200 (born in Mexico) AND citizen == 2 (non-citizen)
age between 18 and 34 AND yrimmig > 0 AND birthyr > 0 AND perwt > 0 AND statefip between 1 and 99
